title: Omnicom Expands Connected Commerce and Retail Media Footprint with Acquisition of Brazilian-based Agencies Outpromo and Global Shopper
text: NEW YORK and SAO PAOLO , July 27, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Omnicom (NYSE: OMC) today announced its media services division, Omnicom Media Group, has acquired Outpromo and Global Shopper, two of Brazil's leading connected commerce and retail media agencies. The acquisitions create the foundation for a dedicated, end-to-end e-commerce and retail media performance agency in the Brazilian market for Omnicom Media Group.

title: Omnicom Declares Dividend
text: NEW YORK , July 25, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- The Board of Directors of Omnicom (NYSE: OMC) declared a quarterly dividend of 70 cents per outstanding share of the corporation's common stock. The dividend is payable on October 12, 2023 to Omnicom common shareholders of record at the close of business on September 21, 2023.

title: Technology sector is ‘under a lot of stress,' another ad agency says
text: Contrary to what Wall Street is saying, another advertising and marketing agency confirmed that the technology sector appears to be having a lot of trouble when it comes to discretionary spending on advertising and marketing.

title: Why Omnicom Stock Plunged Wednesday
text: Omnicom missed revenue estimates in the second quarter, but exceeded expectations for earnings. Management warned of economic uncertainty in the quarters ahead.

title: S&P 500 Gains and Losses Today: Stocks Rally on Solid Earnings News
text: The S&P 500 rose 0.2% on Wednesday, July 19, 2023 as the market rally continued to be fueled by solid earnings reports.

title: Market Rally Continues at Midday on More Positive Earnings Reports
text: The rally in U.S. equities continued at midday on July 19, 2023, buoyed by more strong earnings reports.

title: Omnicom's (OMC) Q2 Earnings Beat Estimates, Increase Y/Y
text: Omnicom's (OMC) second-quarter 2023 revenues increase year over year.

title: Omnicom stock stumbles as 2Q growth doesn't meet expectations
text: Omnicom Group (NYSE:OMC) shares tumbled Wednesday after the company's second-quarter topline results failed to live up to expectations.  After Tuesday's closing bell, the marketing firm posted revenue of $3.61 billion, below Street forecasts of $3.67 billion.

title: Omnicom's stock tumbles to lead the S&P 500's losers, after revenue misses expectations
text: Shares of Omnicom Group Inc. OMC, -10.68% tumbled 10.6% toward an 11-week low in morning trading Wednesday, enough to lead the S&P 500's SPX, +0.27% losers, after the marketing, advertising and corporate communications compared reported a second-quarter earnings beat but revenue that came up short. The selloff dragged down the shares of rival Interpublic Group of Cos.

title: Credera launches global cross-functional AI council and increases AI investment to lead through paradigm shift
text: DALLAS , July 19, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Credera, Omnicom's global boutique consulting firm, today announces a global artificial intelligence (AI) council to create unique insights to help shape the future landscape of AI across the vast breadth of opportunities and challenges.  The launch of the Global AI Council is a part of Credera's expansion of its AI solutions to accelerate transformations.

title: Compared to Estimates, Omnicom (OMC) Q2 Earnings: A Look at Key Metrics
text: While the top- and bottom-line numbers for Omnicom (OMC) give a sense of how the business performed in the quarter ended June 2023, it could be worth looking at how some of its key metrics compare to Wall Street estimates and year-ago values.

title: Omnicom Group Inc (OMC) Q2 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Omnicom Group Inc (NYSE:OMC ) Q2 2023 Earnings Conference Call July 18, 2023 4:30 PM ET Company Participants Gregory Lundberg - Senior Vice President, Investor Relations John Wren - Chairman and Chief Executive Officer Phil Angelastro - Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Michael Nathanson - MoffettNathanson David Karnovsky - J.P. Morgan Ben Swinburne - Morgan Stanley Steven Cahall - Wells Fargo Tim Nollen - Macquarie Craig Huber - Huber Research Jason Bazinet - Citi Operator Good afternoon, and welcome to the Omnicom Second Quarter 2023 Earnings Release Conference Call.

title: Omnicom (OMC) Tops Q2 Earnings Estimates
text: Omnicom (OMC) came out with quarterly earnings of $1.81 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $1.80 per share. This compares to earnings of $1.68 per share a year ago.

title: Omnicom Reports Second Quarter 2023 Results
text: Revenue of $3,609.9 million, with organic growth of 3.4% Operating income of $550.7 million Operating income margin of 15.3% Diluted earnings per share of $1.82 NEW YORK , July 18, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Omnicom (NYSE: OMC) today announced results for the quarter ended June 30, 2023. "Organic revenue grew 3.4% in the second quarter and 4.3% year-to-date, placing us comfortably within our expected range and driving strong growth in earnings per share," said John Wren, Chairman and Chief Executive Officer of Omnicom.

title: MMC LAUNCHES BREAKTHROUGH PARTNERSHIP WITH NONPROFIT PROVENTION HEALTH FOUNDATION
text: - New offering aims to connect industry with local/community public health initiatives - - Initial areas of focus include oncology, vaccines, diabetes management, and cardiovascular health - NEW YORK , July 17, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- MMC, a creatively-led, digitally-driven integrated marketing and communications agency, today announced a groundbreaking strategic partnership with ProVention Health Foundation, a nonprofit organization dedicated to expanding the reach and impact of public health and healthcare programs. This collaboration aims to initiate impactful healthcare programming by tapping into local community influencers, extend grassroots initiatives, and promote data sharing to effectively address the day-to-day health challenges faced by local communities.

title: 2 Top-Rated Stocks to Buy as Earnings Approach
text: As second-quarter earnings continue to roll out a few top-rated stocks will be releasing their quarterly results next week. Among them are Lockheed Martin (LMT) and Omnicom Group (OMC) which are both scheduled to report next Tuesday, July 18.

title: DDB Chicago Promotes Kiska Howell to EVP, Head of Business Leadership
text: Howell's Promotion Follows the Appointment of Emma Montgomery as CEO  NEW YORK , July 14, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- DDB Chicago has today announced the promotion of Kiska Howell to EVP, Head of Business Leadership overseeing leadership and growth for the region's largest office, effective immediately. Previously, Kiska held titles such as SVP, Group Account Director and most recently served as EVP, Executive Business Lead on the Molson Coors account as well as Thomas', Orkin, Hefty and Reynolds.

title: A Recipe for the Future of Food
text: Proprietary research by TBWA's Backslash reveals which Disruptive cultural forces have the potential to revolutionize the Future of Food Optimized health, freedom of choice, and climate change were identified as the most influential ingredients driving spend in the category LOS ANGELES , July 13, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Sourcing ingredients (knowledge and insights) from 42 culture spotters across the globe, today Backslash — the cultural intelligence unit of TBWA\Worldwide — has cooked up the fourth report in its "Future of" series. More than an observational report, the "Future of Food" outlines clear opportunities for businesses to capture a greater share of the future.

title: NEW REPORT REVEALS OMNICOM MEDIA GROUP AGENCIES OUTPERFORMED IN 2022
text: OMD Worldwide Marks Sixth Consecutive #1 Ranking for Billings  PHD and Hearts & Science Outpace the Industry for YOY Growth NEW YORK , July 12, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- A new report from leading independent and international research company COMvergence reveals Omnicom Media Group (OMG) agencies OMD Worldwide, PHD Worldwide and Hearts & Science outperformed the industry for billings volume and YOY growth in 2022.   Released earlier this week, the 2022 Global, Regional & Country Rankings report also reveals OMG as the only global media agency group for which digital share of billings across all of its agencies is at or above 50%, reinforcing OMG's position as the most future-fit media holding company.

title: KETCHUM APPOINTS INDUSTRY VETERAN VINCENT DENTE AS CHIEF CREATIVE OFFICER, U.S.
text: NEW YORK , July 11, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Global communications consultancy Ketchum has announced that Vincent Dente has been brought onboard as Chief Creative Officer, U.S. Dente brings more than 25 years of experience delivering unparalleled creativity in marketing communications, driven by data and culture. In his new role, Dente will lead a diverse group of creative talent that work across all of Ketchum's consultancies and capabilities.

title: Omnicom (OMC) to Report Q2 Results: Wall Street Expects Earnings Growth
text: Omnicom (OMC) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

title: Omnicom Schedules Second Quarter 2023 Earnings Release and Conference Call
text: NEW YORK , July 10, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Omnicom (NYSE: OMC) will publish its second quarter 2023 results on Tuesday, July 18, 2023 after the New York Stock Exchange close of trading. The company will also host a conference call to review such financial results on Tuesday, July 18, 2023, starting at 4:30 p.m.

title: 2 Advertising Stocks to Consider
text: The global advertising industry was worth $531 billion in 2022 and is forecast to grow at a 13.9% compounded annual growth rate (CAGR) through 2030 to reach an incredible value of $1.5 trillion, according to estimates from Research & Markets. This growth is driven by the increasing trend towards digital advertising and emerging areas such as influencer and connected TV marketing.

title: Omnicom (OMC) Rises 43% in a Year: What You Should Know
text: Omnicom (OMC) has a consistent record of returning value to shareholders in the form of dividends and share repurchases.

title: Omnicom Acquires Award Winning Creative Agency Grabarz & Partner
text: NEW YORK , July 6, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Omnicom (NYSE: OMC) today announced the acquisition of Grabarz & Partner to further cement its leadership position in Germany, the fourth largest advertising market in the world. Founded in 1993, Grabarz & Partner is a world-class creative agency headquartered in Hamburg.
